author: lOrm
content: Plan: Category B — local correctness. streaming::TokenUsage is a parse-boundary type with Option<u64> cache fields (provider may not report). session::TokenUsage is the canonical accumulator with u64 fields named cache_write_tokens. Fix: add From<streaming::TokenUsage> for session::TokenUsage at the SSE boundary, document the field-name distinction. Keep both types; streaming re-exports or documents the canonical path.
